name: HWR_COMPETENCY_B
description: The competency table stores profile competency data.

columns.Name: COMPETENCY_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the competency table.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: The Id of the source for the profile which has the competency.

columns.Name: COMPETENCY_TEXT
columns.Comments: This is the full text of the competency.

columns.Name: EVALUATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: This is the evaluation type of the competency.

columns.Name: PROFICIENCY
columns.Comments: This is the proficiency of the competency.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the start date of the competency.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the end date of the competency.

columns.Name: YEARS_OF_EXPERIENCE
columns.Comments: This is the number of years of experience of the competency.

columns.Name: LAST_USED_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the last used date of the competency.

columns.Name: ACQUIRED_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the acquired date of the competency.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDER_ID
columns.Comments: This is the unique Id of the recommender.

columns.Name: RECOMMENDER_URI
columns.Comments: This is the URI identifying the recommender.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
